Original target: meta-llama/Llama-3.1-405B-Instruct-FP8 (fbgemm_fp8 quant)
That repo is GATED on HuggingFace (returns HTTP 401 without auth).

All other public 405B FP8 mirrors (RedHatAI/, neuralmagic/) use the
compressed-tensors quantization format with format=naive-quantized,
NOT the HF-native fbgemm_fp8 schema.

Public fbgemm_fp8 candidates probed (all 401 / gated):
  - facebook/Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct-FP8-FBGEMM
  - facebook/Llama-3-8B-Instruct-FP8-FBGEMM
  - dnhkng/Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct-FP8-FBGEMM
  - intel/Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct-FBGEMM-FP8
  - shuyuej/Llama-3.1-405B-Instruct-fbgemm-fp8
  - tugstugi/Llama-3.1-405B-FBGEMM-FP8
  - MaziyarPanahi/Llama-3-8B-Instruct-fbgemm-fp8
  - several others (full list in agent transcript)

config.json in this dir is from RedHatAI/Meta-Llama-3.1-405B-Instruct-FP8
(compressed-tensors, not fbgemm_fp8). It is provided so the 405B Llama
shape (hidden=16384, layers=126, heads=128, kv_heads=8) is available;
the quantization_config is duplicative with the compressed-tensors fixture
and should not be relied on for fbgemm_fp8 tests.

For HF-native fbgemm_fp8 schema reference (the canonical schema is):
  "quantization_config": {
      "quant_method": "fbgemm_fp8",
      "modules_to_not_convert": ["lm_head"],
      "activation_scale_ub": 1200.0
  }
